publicationNormalization: One player name is translated to ASCII for repository publication; the original account bytes remain unchanged in dataBase64.
interpretationBoundaries: This is a confirmed point-in-time RPC observation, not a permanent account count or finality guarantee.
A recognized magic and layout do not by themselves make a legacy Profile the current owner-derived player-v7 PDA.
The 172,880-byte value is the ELF allocation after 45 bytes of upgradeable-loader metadata; the full ProgramData account is 172,925 bytes.
Matching the retained local artifact to the observed ELF allocation does not prove that the dirty source worktree reproducibly produced that artifact.
Generated artwork is narrative teaching material and is not evidence for any account count in this audit.
